mods.name: Cold Air Intake
mods.description: Feed the 5.0L Coyote V8 cooler, denser air with a performance intake. Adds a satisfying V8 induction roar under throttle.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox and intake tube. Install new system with provided hardware. Ensure MAF sensor is properly seated. 20 minutes. No tune required for basic intakes.

mods.name: Axle-Back Exhaust
mods.description: Replace the stock mufflers for an aggressive Coyote V8 bark. Active exhaust-equipped cars can retain valve control with some systems.
mods.installNotes: Unbolt stock mufflers at the mid-pipe flange. New mufflers hang on factory hangers. No cutting needed. 30 minutes on jack stands. Active exhaust wiring retains mode switching on supported kits.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Drop the S550 by 25–30mm to close the factory wheel gap and improve cornering grip with a lower center of gravity.
mods.partNumbers: Ford Performance M-5300-X, Eibach Pro-Kit E10-35-029-06-22
mods.installNotes: Spring compressor required. Swap all four corners. MagneRide-equipped cars need springs specifically designed for the electronic dampers. Alignment mandatory.

mods.name: ECU Tune (Coyote Flash)
mods.description: A Coyote V8 tune optimizes fuel and ignition timing for 20–30hp gains, improved throttle response, and adjustable rev limits.
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II port. Select tune matching your mod level and fuel grade. 91 or 93 octane maps available. Save stock tune before flashing. Pairs well with intake and exhaust.

mods.name: Long Tube Headers
mods.description: Long tube headers are the single best bolt-on for the Coyote V8, adding 25–40hp and completely transforming the exhaust sound.
mods.installNotes: Remove factory exhaust manifolds. Installation requires lifting the engine slightly for clearance. Include off-road or high-flow catted H/X-pipe. Retune required. 6+ hour install.

mods.name: Supercharger Kit
mods.description: A roots-type or twin-screw supercharger adds 200–300hp to the Coyote V8, pushing the S550 well into the 600–700hp range on pump gas.
mods.partNumbers: Roush R2650 Phase 2 422184, Whipple Gen 5 3.0L WK-2626B-STG2
mods.installNotes: Full kit includes supercharger, intercooler, fuel system upgrades, and calibration. Requires premium fuel. Upgraded half shafts recommended. MT-82 manual transmission is the weak link — consider upgraded clutch and trans.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers deliver precise handling for road course, autocross, or drag racing. The S550 platform transforms with proper suspension setup.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 35230067, BMR Koni Single Adjustable
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement. MagneRide cars need specific kits or MagneRide delete. Set ride height 20mm below stock for street. Stiffer rear springs help rotation. Full alignment required.

mods.name: Differential Upgrade
mods.description: The factory open differential is the S550 GT's biggest weakness. An upgraded LSD transforms traction and corner exit behavior.
mods.partNumbers: Ford Performance M-4204-M Trak-Lok, Wavetrac ATB Diff
mods.installNotes: Remove rear differential cover and stock carrier. Install new LSD unit. Set backlash and preload to spec. Refill with 75W-140 synthetic gear oil with friction modifier. 4+ hours.
